name: Зимний Скиталец
description: Winter Walkers hone their craft in the bleak and frozen wilds of places like Icewind Dale. These ruthless, rimed Rangers hunt monsters that haunt arctic wastelands, eventually becoming frigid terrors themselves. Winter Walkers are well versed in the phenomena of Icewind Dale, including the latent magic of fallen Netherese cities, endemic monsters like yetis and crag cats, and the rising threat of Underdark invaders. Due to their cold pragmatism, terrifying magic, and mastery of the region, Winter Walkers are regarded with equal parts respect and fear.
shortDescription: Withstand the Horrors of Frigid Wastelands

details.bitingCold: {@b Biting Cold.} Damage from your weapon attacks, Ranger spells, and Ranger features ignores {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Cold damage.
details.frostResistance: {@b Frost Resistance.} You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Cold damage.
details.polarStrikes: {@b Polar Strikes.} When you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can deal an extra {@damage 1d4} Cold damage to the target, which can take this extra damage only once per turn. When you reach Ranger level 11, this extra damage increases to {@damage 1d6}.

features.name: Hunter's Rime
features.description: Ice rimes you and your prey, protecting you and slowing them. When you cast {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, you gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to {@damage 1d10} plus your Ranger level. Additionally, while a creature is marked by your {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, it can't take the {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

features.name: Winter Walker Spells
features.description: When you reach a Ranger level specified in the Winter Walker Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.
